steps.title: Apply the group increases
steps.content: A $47\%$ increase in advanced riders means multiply $a$ by $1.47$. A $38\%$ increase in recreational riders means multiply $b$ by $1.38$.

steps.title: Apply the total increase
steps.content:
The original total number of riders was $40$. A $43\%$ total increase means the 2022 total is
$$40(1.43)$$

steps.title: Write the matching equation
steps.content:
The sum of the two 2022 group counts must equal the 2022 total:
$$1.47a+1.38b=40(1.43)$$
The answer is C.
